summary: The empirical caveats are now proportionate to the evidence. The revised manuscript distinguishes synthetic/injected performance from real-data transfer, explicitly marks CP inactive, and names label noise as a central limitation.
strengths: Cleaned-label composite ROC-AUC = 0.515 is foregrounded in the abstract and evaluation summary.
Cross-Platform Correlation is explicitly described as inactive in the current single-chain deployment.
The manuscript calls the framework first-generation and does not claim mature production validation.
